title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support Before Launch Date
scenario: Show limited support pop-up on home screen when current date is before device launch date
steps: 1. Set the device's current date to a date before the device's launch date.
2. Navigate to the device home screen.
3. Observe the home screen for any pop-up or limited support indication.
4. If a pop-up appears, read the message displayed.
5. Tap outside the pop-up to dismiss it.
expected: A pop-up displays the message: "Device support coming soon. In-app functionality may be limited." The pop-up can be dismissed by tapping outside of it.
